name: Swiss Steak (Beef Round)
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 pounds round steak, about 1+1/2 inches thick
1 cup chopped tomatoes, peeled and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Tenderize the steak.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet or cast iron skillet.
3. Saute garlic, onion, green pepper, and mushrooms until tender.
4. Coat the meat with flour, then brown it in the oil along with the vegetables.
5. Add seasonings, tomato puree, and chopped tomatoes.
6. Cover and simmer for 1+1/2 hours over low heat. Add a small amount of water as needed to maintain a steady simmer; this will create a thick gravy.
7. Serve with mashed potatoes and steamed green beans.
